positive: A minimalist, vibrant geometric forest scene. Silhouette of stylized, whimsical trees with varying organic shapes, interspersed with simple abstract geometric patterns like arcs, triangles, and dotted lines. The color palette is highly contrasted and joyful: deep sapphire blue, electric emerald green, and sunny lemon yellow, set against a crisp white background. Focus on clean, bold outlines and strong negative space. The overall composition should be balanced and repeatably appealing, suitable for textile printing. Graphic design style, flat vector illustration, highly detailed, pop art aesthetic.
